banner.prefix: What can I do for you? Press

agentMode.prompt: Choose the agent mode you prefer:

options.agent: Agent (Operate the OS, with all capability to the files on the computer)

options.chat: Chat (A chat tool, won't do any operation)

env.model: Please enter the LLM model name:

responseApi.prompt: Will you use the OPENAI Response API?
